app_title: Operator Reliability Assessment under Data Uncertainty

title_page.main_heading: Reliability Assessment of Operator Activity Algorithms under Data Uncertainty
title_page.subtitle: Information Technology for Ergonomic Studies
title_page.description_p1: A web implementation of an information technology that combines the functional-structural theory of ergatic systems (Hubinskyi school) with the apparatus of fuzzy sets. It enables evaluation of operator activity algorithm reliability indicators when input parameters (probabilities, operation durations) are specified as membership functions rather than crisp numbers.
title_page.description_p2: Developed as part of master's thesis at Sumy State University, in collaboration with ergonomic projects of Penn State University.
title_page.footer_collaboration: In collaboration with Penn State University

tfs_types.RKR1: TFS-3: WO with control and rework

ptimely_methods.tooltip_html:
Auto: trimf/trapmf → analytical, others → possibility.
Analytical: piecewise formulas, exact for triangular MF.
Possibility: max μ_T(t), t≤T_dir — universal.
Integral: normalized cumtrapz.

help.title: User guide
help.overview_text: The web application allows assessment of fuzzy reliability indicators of an operator's activity algorithm in the form of membership functions.
help.step1: Select the type of functional structure (TFS-1 to TFS-5) from the dropdown.
help.step2: Enter parameters for working operations: for each fuzzy parameter select MF type (triangular, trapezoidal, Gaussian) and enter its parameters.
help.step3: Set the directive time T_dir — the time within which the whole algorithm must be executed.
help.step4: Select method for P̃_timely calculation (Auto recommended).
help.step5: Click 'Evaluate' — you will get 4 plots of fuzzy reliability indicators.
help.scenarios_text: The current parameter set can be saved as a scenario with a custom name. Saved scenarios are available in the right panel. Any saved scenario can be loaded back into the form.
help.scenarios_compare: To compare several algorithm variants: select 2-5 scenarios (checkboxes) and click 'Compare selected'.
help.export_text: The 'Download JSON' button saves the current form state as a file. This file can later be loaded back via 'Load JSON'.
help.method_analytical: Analytical: piecewise formulas for triangular/trapezoidal MF. Didactically transparent but loses accuracy in fuzzy multiplication/division.
help.method_possibility: Possibility: max μ_T(t) for t ≤ T_dir. Universal, works for all MF types.
help.method_integral: Integral: normalized cumulative integral of membership function. Gives smooth S-shaped curve (CDF-like).
help.method_auto: Auto: analytical for triangular/trapezoidal, possibility for the rest.
